subcodes.first_line: That which hath caused all the Books of the world to bow down in submission hath been sent down, and that which lay treasured within the knowledge of God, the Lord of all worlds, hath been made manifest [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد نزل ما خضعت له کتب العالم و ظهر ما کان مخزونا فی علم الله رب العالمین هذا
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @prayers (general or uncategorized), @heedlessness and ignorance of the people
